title: Perjalanan Taksi
opening: Selamat siang, Pak/Bu. Mau ke mana?

t1.prompt: Selamat siang, Pak/Bu. Mau ke mana?
t1.promptTranslation: Selamat siang, Pak/Bu (Sah-lah-mat see-ang, Pak/Boo) — Good afternoon, Sir/Ma'am. Where are you going?

t2.prompt: Baik, menuju ke [Nama Tempat]. Apa Anda tahu jalan terbaik atau ada rute khusus yang ingin dilewati?
t2.promptTranslation: Baik, menuju ke [Nama Tempat] (Bah-ik, meh-noo-joo keh [Nah-ma Tem-pat]) — Okay, heading to [Place Name]. Do you know the best route, or is there a specific route you'd like to take?

t3.prompt: Untuk tujuan itu, biasanya lewat jalan tol lebih cepat, tapi ada kemungkinan macet di jam sibuk. Kalau lewat jalan biasa mungkin lebih lama sedikit tapi pemandangannya lebih bagus. Kira-kira mau lewat mana?
t3.promptTranslation: For that destination, usually taking the toll road is faster, but there's a possibility of traffic jams during peak hours. If we take the regular road, it might be a bit longer but the view is better. Which way would you prefer to go?

t4.prompt: Baik, Pak/Bu. Kita jalan sekarang, ya. Omong-omong, ada barang di bagasi atau di jok belakang?
t4.promptTranslation: Baik, Pak/Bu (Bah-ik, Pak/Boo) — Okay, Sir/Ma'am. We'll leave now, alright? By the way, do you have any luggage in the trunk or on the back seat?

t5.prompt: Oke, sudah aman ya. Untuk pembayaran, nanti bisa tunai atau pakai aplikasi kalau mau. Totalnya sekitar empat puluh lima ribu rupiah, tergantung rute yang diambil dan kondisi lalu lintas.
t5.promptTranslation: Okay, it's all secure. For payment, you can pay cash later or use an app if you prefer. The total will be around forty-five thousand rupiah, depending on the route taken and traffic conditions.

t-repeat.prompt: Mohon maaf, bisa diulang? Saya kurang jelas.
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Mohon maaf, bisa diulang? (Moh-hon ma-af, bee-sa dee-oo-lang?) — I apologize, could you please repeat that? I didn't quite catch it.

t-end.prompt: Oke, sudah sampai tujuan, Pak/Bu. Terima kasih sudah naik taksi saya, hati-hati di jalan ya.
t-end.promptTranslation: Okay, we've arrived at the destination, Sir/Ma'am. Thank you for riding my taxi, please be careful on your way.
